# registerGetACoffeeTool()

> **Service Layer**

```ts
function registerGetACoffeeTool(server: McpServer, runtime: ManagedRuntime<GetACoffeeService, unknown>): void;
```

Defined in: [src/app/service/coffee/module/get-a-coffee/get-a-coffee.service.ts:109](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/service/coffee/module/get-a-coffee/get-a-coffee.service.ts#L109)

Registers the `get-a-coffee` MCP tool on the given server.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type                                                                                                                       | Description                                                                                                                              |
| --------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `server`  | [`McpServer`](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk)                                                      | The [McpServer](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk) instance to register on.                                         |
| `runtime` | [`ManagedRuntime`](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/)<[`GetACoffeeService`](../classes/GetACoffeeService.md), `unknown`> | A [ManagedRuntime](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) whose environment includes [GetACoffeeService](../classes/GetACoffeeService.md). |

## Returns

`void`

## Remarks

Wiring steps:

1. Calls [McpServer.registerTool](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk) with tool name
   `"get-a-coffee"`, a description, and
   [GetACoffeeInputStandard](../../get-a-coffee.schema/variables/GetACoffeeInputStandard.md) as `inputSchema`.
2. In the async handler, decodes the raw `args` with
   [Schema.decodeUnknownSync](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) against
   [GetACoffeeInput](../../get-a-coffee.schema/variables/GetACoffeeInput.md) to extract the validated `name`.
3. Delegates to
   [executeFormatted](../classes/GetACoffeeService.md#property-executeformatted)
   inside the provided [ManagedRuntime](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/).
